query: SELECT id, qbInvoiceId, invoiceNumber, customerPhone, amount, status, createdAt FROM qb_payment_syncs WHERE amount = 30.00 OR (customerPhone LIKE '%94493883%' AND amount = '30.00') ORDER BY createdAt DESC LIMIT 3;
